mapper.select: SELECT T.TASK_NO, T.EMP_NO, T.DEPT_CD, T.TASK_TITLE, T.TASK_CN, T.TASK_STAT_CD, T.PROGRESS_RATE AS TASK_PROGRESS_RATE, TO_CHAR(T.TASK_START_DTM, 'YYYY.MM.DD') || ' ~ ' || TO_CHAR(T.TASK_END_DTM, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS TASK_PERIOD, E.EMP_NM FROM ASSIGN_TASK T JOIN EMP E ON T.EMP_NO = E.EMP_NO WHERE T.EMP_NO = #{empNo} AND T.DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY T.REG_DTM DESC

SELECT L.TASK_LOG_NO, L.TASK_NO, L.EMP_NO, L.LOG_DIV_CD, L.LOG_TITLE, L.LOG_CN, L.WORK_DTM, L.REG_DTM, L.MOD_DTM, E.EMP_NM, T.TASK_TITLE FROM DAILY_TASK_LOG L JOIN EMP E ON L.EMP_NO = E.EMP_NO JOIN ASSIGN_TASK T ON L.TASK_NO = T.TASK_NO WHERE L.TASK_NO = #{taskNo} AND L.EMP_NO = #{empNo} AND L.DEL_YN = 'N'
AND TRUNC(L.WORK_DTM) >= TO_DATE(#{dateFrom}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND TRUNC(L.WORK_DTM) <= TO_DATE(#{dateTo}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
ORDER BY L.WORK_DTM DESC

SELECT L.TASK_LOG_NO, L.TASK_NO, L.EMP_NO, L.LOG_DIV_CD, L.LOG_TITLE, L.LOG_CN, L.WORK_DTM, L.REG_DTM, L.MOD_DTM, E.EMP_NM, T.TASK_TITLE FROM DAILY_TASK_LOG L JOIN EMP E ON L.EMP_NO = E.EMP_NO JOIN ASSIGN_TASK T ON L.TASK_NO = T.TASK_NO WHERE L.TASK_LOG_NO = #{taskLogNo} AND L.DEL_YN = 'N'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO DAILY_TASK_LOG ( TASK_LOG_NO, TASK_NO, EMP_NO, LOG_DIV_CD, LOG_TITLE, LOG_CN, WORK_DTM, REG_DTM, DEL_YN ) VALUES ( (SELECT NVL(MAX(TASK_LOG_NO), 0) + 1 FROM DAILY_TASK_LOG), #{taskNo}, #{empNo}, #{logDivCd}, #{logTitle}, #{logCn}, SYSDATE, SYSDATE, 'N' )
mapper.update: UPDATE DAILY_TASK_LOG SET LOG_TITLE = #{logTitle}, LOG_CN = #{logCn}, MOD_DTM = SYSDATE WHERE TASK_LOG_NO = #{taskLogNo} AND EMP_NO = #{empNo} AND DEL_YN = 'N'
UPDATE ASSIGN_TASK SET PROGRESS_RATE = #{progressRate}, TASK_STAT_CD = #{taskStatCd}, MOD_DTM = SYSDATE WHERE TASK_NO = #{taskNo} AND DEL_YN = 'N'
